title: Dodecastigma integrifolium
taxonomy: Dodecastigma integrifolium is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This family is commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. It is a relatively small family, consisting of around 1,700 species. The Boraginaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including Boraginoideae, Eritrichioideae, and Cynoglossoideae. The classification of Dodecastigma integrifolium within this family highlights its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.

intro: Dodecastigma integrifolium, also known as the Kola nut tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Berberidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, showcasing its potential in alleviating various health conditions.
